I walk the line where silence starts to bend,

The answer sleeps behind a veiled threat,
Don’t lift the lid, just feel the weight instead,
The truth you seek might kill the one you get,


I'm both the breath and the final sigh,
I live in shadows you can't deny,
I’m in between the now and never,
Stuck in a loop that snaps forever,
Don’t try to fix what can't be seen,
I’m the ghost inside the in-between,
I’m the question you can't outsmart,
The fragile truth, a quantum heart,


A ticking box, a quantum-loaded game,
One side is death, the other has no name,
Each thought you think could tip the scale within,
But knowing spoils the state I'm living in,
The more you ask, the less you understand,
It all dissolves the moment you demand,
Uncertainty is not a flaw, but a rule,
We’re both the wise man,
And the fool.


I’m not the truth, I’m the space between,
A mirrored soul in a quantum dream,
Collapse the light, and I fade away,
But ‘til you look, I’m here to stay,
I’m not alive, but I’m not dead,
Just superposed inside your head,
Don’t chase the path you can’t define,
The cat you fear is also mine,


One eye open, one eye closed,
Am I the secret you never chose?
Don’t blink, you might collapse the scene,
Reality tears at the quantum seam,
Your heartbeat thunders like fate’s own drum, 
But no one knows what I’ve become,
Two states split in perfect time,
Until you call, 
This box is mine.


I’m both the fire and the frozen stream,
I’m real to you, but I’m still a dream,
The moment breaks when seen too clear,
But in the dark, I reappear,
I’m not just one, I’m possibility,
Both sides of me, inside infinity,
Don’t ask the box to tell you why,
